title: Cashu
description: Cashu is a Bitcoin-backed ecash protocol and wallet ecosystem built around blind-signature mints. It improves privacy and transaction speed while preserving explicit mint trust tradeoffs.

resources.title: Cashu Wallet README
resources.notes: Project overview for the user-facing Cashu wallet and ecosystem.

resources.title: Cashu NUT Specifications
resources.notes: Canonical protocol specifications for interoperable Cashu mints and wallets.

resources.title: Mastering Bitcoin
resources.notes: Broad technical reference for the wallet, transaction, and protocol ideas that support this topic.
